title: Assistant Registration Officer 8 February 2026
text:
VACANCY NOTICE
Port Vila
Companies House
Assistant Registration Officer- Business Names & Partnerships Rue Bouganville
PMB 9023, Port Vila
Efate, Vanuatu
The Vanuatu Financial Services Commission wishes to recruit one Assistant Registration Officer and
will be based in Port Vila.
Luganville
Millenium Building
Duties and Responsibilities: PMB 9005, Luganville
Santo, Vanuatu
 Receive, review, and process applications for registration of Business Names and
Torba
Partnerships; c/o Torba Provincial
 Maintain and update Business Name and Partnership records in the registry system; Government Council
Sola, Banks, Vanuatu
 Assist with amendments, renewals, cessations, and cancellations of registered entities;
 Conduct preliminary compliance checks on applications and filings; Penama
c/o Vanuatu Post
 Assist with reservation of Business Names and Partnerships;
Saratamata
 Maintain entity filings and data management systems; East Ambae, Vanuatu
 Provide reports and analysis of entities;
Malampa
 Assist with entity search, printing of certificates, and registry extracts; c/o Malampa Provincial
Government Council
 Provide customer service assistance at the counter, by phone, email, and online
PO Box 22, Lakatoro
platforms; Malekula, Vanuatu
 Assist with outgoing correspondence and administrative support duties; and
Tafea
 Escalate complex or non-compliant matters to senior officers when required.
c/o Tafea Provincial
Government Council
PO Box 28, Lenakel
Minimum Qualification
Tanna, Vanuatu
 A Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Law or related field
 Must have good analytical and report writing skills;
 Ability to communicate effectively and in a professional manner, proficient communication in
English language a must. Preference will be given to candidates with proficiency in both
English and French language;
 Must be computer literate;
 Must have the ability to identify issues, select appropriate solutions and its implementation in
a regulatory environment;
 Commitment, professionalism and a willingness to make positive contribution to the
performance and environment of the VFSC in delivery of services to the general public; and
 Be a good character;
Any citizens having the required qualifications stipulated above must apply in writing, attached with
copies of your educational transcripts and CV and marked “CONFIDENTIAL” to:
The Commissioner,
Vanuatu Financial Services Commission,
Private Mail Bag 9023, PORT VILA.
Applications must be received by 4:30pm of business day of Friday, 20th February
2026
www.vfsc.vu info@vfsc.vu
IMPORTANT NOTE: This letter may be received only by the named addressee and anyone authorised by the named addressee. It is
confidential and contains material which is the subject of legal prof essional privilege and/or public interest privilege. Unauthorised
retention, publication, forwarding or other use of this letter may lead to civil or criminal liability. If you have received this letter in
error the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission requests that you immediately inform us and delete it.
